items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: A single-expand accordion with animated transitions, optional per-item icons, borderless mode and disabled items.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: A callout banner for inline feedback with success, warning, error and info variants, plus an optional title and dismiss button.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: A small status label with semantic color variants and rounded, bordered, opaque and size modifiers.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: A button with primary, secondary, danger and ghost variants, three sizes, and normal, square and circle shapes.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: A checkbox with a built-in label, supporting controlled and uncontrolled usage and a disabled state.

items.name: collapsible
items.title: Collapsible
items.description: A collapsible panel with an animated expand/collapse transition, optional leading icon, borderless mode and a disabled state.

items.name: combobox
items.title: Combobox
items.description: A searchable select input with async loading, custom value entry, clearable selection and an optional leading icon.

items.name: context-menu
items.title: Context Menu
items.description: A right-click menu with nested submenus, shortcuts, separators, danger items and dynamic item resolution from the trigger event.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: A modal dialog with small, medium and large sizes, optional description and footer, and a non-closable mode for forced confirmation.

items.name: drawer
items.title: Drawer
items.description: A sliding panel that opens from any side of the screen, with a title, description and footer area.

items.name: dropdown
items.title: Dropdown
items.description: A dropdown menu attached to any trigger, with nested submenus, icons, shortcuts, separators, danger items and a compact mode.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: A single-line text input with error state, optional leading icon and disabled state.

items.name: input-number
items.title: Input Number
items.description: A numeric input with stepper buttons, min/max/step constraints, integer-only and clearable modes.

items.name: input-password
items.title: Input Password
items.description: A password input with a visibility toggle, error state and optional leading icon.

items.name: knob
items.title: Knob
items.description: A rotary knob control for numeric values, adjusted by dragging, with multiple sizes.

items.name: menu
items.title: Menu
items.description: Shared floating menu primitives (items, nested submenus, shortcuts, separators) used by the dropdown and context-menu components.

items.name: multi-combobox
items.title: Multi Combobox
items.description: A searchable multiple-selection input that shows selected options as removable tags, with async loading, custom value entry, tag overflow collapsing, clearable selection and an optional leading icon.

items.name: multi-select
items.title: Multi Select
items.description: A multiple-selection select that shows selected options as removable tags, with tag overflow collapsing, clearable selection, optional leading icon, and error and disabled states.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: A click-triggered floating panel for arbitrary content, positionable on any side of its trigger, with an optional title and a pointing arrow.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: A progress indicator in linear or circular shape with semantic color variants and sizes.

items.name: radio
items.title: Radio
items.description: A radio button with a built-in label, plus a RadioGroup for managing a single selection.

items.name: rating
items.title: Rating
items.description: A star rating input with hover preview, a pop animation on select, configurable count, half-star precision, a customizable icon shape, three sizes, clearable selection, and read-only and disabled states.

items.name: segmented-control
items.title: Segmented Control
items.description: A segmented control with an animated sliding thumb, primary and secondary variants, multiple sizes and per-item disabled state.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: A select input with placeholder, clearable selection, optional leading icon, and error and disabled states.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: A pulsing placeholder block for loading states.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: A horizontal slider for selecting a value from a range, with a disabled state.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: A toggle switch with a built-in label and multiple sizes.

items.name: tab
items.title: Tabs
items.description: A tab bar with an animated active indicator, multiple sizes and per-item disabled state.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: Styled table primitives (header, body, rows, cells and caption) for tabular data.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: A multi-line text input with error and disabled states.

items.name: toast
items.title: Toast
items.description: Animated toast notifications with semantic variants, action buttons, custom duration and an imperative toast() API plus a Toaster outlet.

items.name: toggle
items.title: Toggle
items.description: A pressable toggle button with semantic variants and sizes, plus a ToggleGroup for exclusive or cancelable selection.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: A hover tooltip that can be positioned on any side of its trigger, with a disabled mode.
